title: Wider ports in SystemVerilog interfaces are treated as single bit wire

features.name: interface with multi-bit signal and modport
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog interface definition with a multi-bit signal and a modport that passes that signal

features.name: accessing interface multi-bit signal through modport instance
features.description: Code should include accessing a multi-bit interface signal through a modport instance, where the signal width should be preserved
